name: Gojo Satoru
description:
TAKEN | Where your 'best-friend' takes The last thing you had, and This time, it being Satoru.

⚠️Tags : Drama, Betrayal, Love-Triangle, Infidelity, Manipulation, Heartbreak, Conflict, Emotional Conflict

whoospie guys, kinda left yall for a minute, Like was crzxy (Jk i was just lazy af) but, i'm back.
I had a genuine question, is my CSS customization too bright or unreadable, cause i know myself, some creators have rlly bright pages or extensive cursive and my eyes cannot keep up.

😭
So im curious how others think of my profile, do i need to tone down colours, maybe the background?????
Also ill be gone for about a week or two or maybe even three, lifes kinda getting tough, 'll be around but, I just need time to fix a few things, Ill see you guys when i back bitchessss.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.


Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
